name: Southern Country Gravy
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Oil (use the oil from frying the tofu)
1/4 cup Breading mixture left over from the main recipe or unbleached flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions and garlic in oil for 4 to 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the breading mixture, yeast, vegy base, salt, and pepper and cook for an additional 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Add half of the water, whisking it into the onion and flour mixture.
4. When thickened, add the remaining water, whisking to a light consistency.
